tweets.text:
AI doesn’t replace your intent.

It removes the friction that used to slow you down.

If your instinct is to add checkpoints, approvals, and process, AI now lets you build ten layers of it before lunch.

This is creating two very different types of founders:

Those who use AI to https://t.co/cdM9lUUC0x
tweets.name: Anand Butani

tweets.text:
Is Claude Fable 5 actually cracked or are we getting played again?

@karpathy is hyped. Builders are pissed. The internet can’t agree 👀 

Which side are you on? 

#Claude @anthropicai #Mythos #AI https://t.co/TbwC2D5Aaz
tweets.name: Anand Butani

tweets.text:
1/ ⚠️ Most engineers dump everything into CLAUDE.md.

Claude Code has 3 layers:

→ User: global (machine only)
→ Local: personal (git-ignored)
→ Project: team (committed)

Local is the fix for settings leaking into repos.

Which layer are you missing? 👇

#ClaudeCode https://t.co/JTRXfPmIvC
tweets.name: Anand Butani

tweets.text:
🚨 Anthropic, the company behind Claude,  just committed $150 million to put 1,000 people inside nonprofits across America. 

Their job: help those organizations actually use AI.

Here's the gap they're trying to close 👇️ 

AI tools exist. They're powerful, widely available, https://t.co/IlEkmROoco
tweets.name: Anand Butani

tweets.text:
🚀 Claude skills for almost any task!

2-min way to find one:

1. Name task in 1 sentence
2. Run /skills
3. Check https://t.co/fwPOAvnr0m or awesome-claude-code GitHub
4. Install to ~/.claude/skills/
5. No match? Create text file

Stop reinventing!

Which one first? 👇 https://t.co/y4ZnafwCj5
tweets.name: Anand Butani

tweets.text:
🚨 Most CLAUDE.md files are written like boring docs. 

Claude reads them like strict instructions.

One simple fix changes everything:

Every single line starts with a verb.

“Code quality standards” = instantly ignored ❌️ 
“Always run the linter before editing any file” = https://t.co/hjcu9eGIRl
tweets.name: Anand Butani

tweets.text:
Apple just quietly gave Claude 2.5 BILLION potential users.

Everyone’s talking about the Siri/Gemini headline from WWDC.

But the real move? iOS 27 now ships with Extensions.

One toggle in Settings → Claude becomes the default AI across:

➡️ Writing Tools
